data.acceptance:
1. CLI accepts 'kno new -e' and creates a knot with exploration workflow
2. Newly created exploration knots have status 'ready_for_exploration'
3. Knot can transition from ready_for_exploration → exploration → shipped
4. Knot can transition from any state → abandoned
5. Transition to shipped is rejected if the knot has zero related knots (with clear error message)
6. Transition to shipped succeeds when at least one related knot exists
7. `kno ls` and `kno show` accurately display exploration workflow knots and their states
8. All workflow state transitions are tested with 100% coverage of the validation logic
